name: Eggplant Di Carnevalle from Loren Martin
recipeIngredient: 1 large Unpeeled eggplant, sliced 1/4 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Great side dish for any meat. Lightly beat 4 eggs.
2. Coat the eggplant with flour, dip in beaten eggs, and coat with bread crumbs.
3. Cook in hot oil until lightly browned; drain on paper towels.
4. Place thawed spinach in a sieve and squeeze out water.
5. Combine with remaining egg, ricotta, and Parmesan cheeses, oregano, basil, garlic, salt, and pepper.
6. Prepare the sauce mix using water, tomato paste, and 1 tbsp oil.
7. Spread 1/3 sauce mixture on bottom of greased shallow 3-qt casserole.
8. Layer 1/2 eggplant slices over sauce; cover with 1/2 spinach mixture and thin layer of sauce.
9. Top with 1/2 mozzarella cheese slices and repeat, beginning with eggplant and ending with mozzarella.
10. Cover loosely with foil and bake at 350 degrees F for 25 minutes.
11. Uncover and bake for 15 to 25 minutes longer, until cheese is melted and browned.
